title: Ethiopian Beef Stir Fry
description: A quick and flavorful dish made with tender beef and a blend of spices. Serve with steamed rice or injera bread for a complete meal.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the beef strips and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Remove the beef from the skillet and set aside.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of oil to the skillet.
Add the onion, bell pepper, and garlic to the skillet and cook until the vegetables are tender, about 4-5 minutes.
Add the tomato paste to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Add the stir-fry sauce to the skillet and stir to combine.
Return the beef to the skillet and stir to coat with the sauce.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve the beef and sauce over steamed rice or injera bread, garnished with chopped cilantro.
Optional: add crushed red pepper for some heat.
